execution_chain = []
if "Windows" in os_module.name:
    execution_chain.append("cmd.exe")
    execution_chain.append("-c")
else:
    execution_chain.append("sh")
    execution_chain.append("-c")

execution_chain.append(f"groups {input_value}")

completed_process = sp_module.run(
    execution_chain,
    capture_output=True,
    encoding="utf-8"
)
